content:
💡 qmd | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a fast, private, and intelligent search engine for personal and professional documents, enabling users and AI agents to quickly find and utilize information.
✨ Key Features: • Local, on-device indexing and search • Supports markdown, meeting transcripts, documentation, and knowledge bases • Combines BM25 full-text search, vector semantic search, and LLM re-ranking • Uses node-llama-cpp with GGUF models for local LLM operations
📖 Summary: QMD is a local, on-device search engine designed to index and query personal documents, notes, and knowledge bases. It combines traditional keyword search, semantic vector search, and LLM re-ranking to provide high-quality, context-aware results, making it ideal for integration with AI agents.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
